chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-42 of 2022. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Agha Faisal, 01. For orders on M.A.No.216/2022 (U/A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.217/2022 (E/A). 04. For hearing of main case. 02.02.2022 Mr. Abdul Ghani Bijarani, Advocate for the petitioner. = * = * = * = * = * = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exception. 4. The petitioner by way of the instant constitutional petition has mainly sought for direction against the Project Manager, SIBA Testing Service, IBA University Sukkur, to declare the result of Test, which he conducted for Junior Elementary School Teacher and Primary School Teacher and allegedly participated by the petitioner. On being asked, whether SIBA Testing Service, IBA University Sukkur is a private entity? Learned counsel for the petitioner was fair enough to say “yes”. If it is so, then no writ could be issued against the private entity. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE.
